notes: Bump every section at session close. Replace last_session_id + last_commit + current_phase + next_phase + next_prompt as appropriate. Migrations are OPTIONAL: if this project applies schema migrations, add "migrations_dir": "<path>" (e.g. drizzle, backend/alembic/versions) and "migrations_applied": ["0001_..."]; omit both on a non-code project and `casp check` skips migrations entirely. Run `npx @justethales/casp check` before push.
